bird.summary: The Rota white-eye or Rota bridled white-eye (Zosterops rotensis) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is critically endange…

locations.name: 羅塔島
locations.summary: 羅塔島（英語：Rota Island，查莫羅語：Luta），是位於美屬北馬利安納群島中最南邊的一座小島，該島被稱之為友誼之島。島上最大聚落為宋宋，第二大聚落為西那帕羅。 歷史 羅塔島於西元1521年為當代葡萄牙航海家－麥哲倫所發現，不過麥…

relations.subject: Rota white-eye
relations.evidence: It is critically endangered and endemic to Rota in the Northern Mariana Islands, where it mainly occurs in mature, wet limestone forests
